name: Woodys Top Putt
about: Woody's Top Putt is a multi-activity entertainment venue offering both indoor golf simulators and an 18-hole LED mini-golf course. The venue features four golf simulators with over 180,000 virtual courses available, providing a realistic golfing experience for players of all skill levels. The facility also hosts a variety of activities including axe throwing, splatter paint, and rage rooms. Food and drinks are available on-site, making it a one-stop destination for entertainment and dining. The venue is suitable for individuals, families, and groups, offering party packages and private room rentals for various events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with over 180,000 courses to choose from
Indoor facilities allow for year-round play regardless of weather conditions
Offers both serious golf simulation and casual mini-golf options for different preferences
Club rentals are available, making it convenient for players who do not have their own equipment

food_and_drink.notes: Variety of foods available that pleases the entire family
No alcohol mentioned on the website

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or use theirs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available on-site, but it is not explicitly stated if outside food is allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An average group can play 18 holes in one hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers activities like mini-golf, splatter paint, and axe throwing, making it suitable for families and kids.
